title: oldenlandia balfourii
intro: Oldenlandia balfourii, also known as Balfour's Oldenlandia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a traditional medicinal plant used in various parts of the world, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it has been employed for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating digestive issues. In herbal medicine, Oldenlandia balfourii is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as an ointment or poultice to apply topically to affected areas.
